name: Beastmen
strengths: High mobility on the tactical grid
Strong natural weapon damage from claws and fangs
Excels at flanking, rushing, and finishing wounded prey
weaknesses: Light armor and low defensive stats
Vulnerable to ranged and area attacks
Short engagement range limits safe positioning

identity.theme: Tribal hunters of the blue wilds
identity.culture: Pack and clan loyalty, territorial, honor earned through the hunt

story_hook: The Beastmen clans roam the frontier between settled blue-world outposts and the untamed wastes, defending sacred hunting grounds from encroaching drones and void corruption.
desc: Tribal warriors with claw and fang. Fast strikers of the wild clans.
